case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DIANA GARCIA VAZQUEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $652.27 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VAZQUEZ, DIANA GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-16-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIANA GARCIA VAZQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINEUD TO OCT-16, 2019 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIANA GARCIA VAZQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
